transcript.text:
Hello everyone
I prepared some instant noodles today
I showed my pantry cabinet not too long ago
I realized I had about 400 packs
This is not a green screen
Real noodle packs
Which one should I eat?
Let's start with Jin Jjampong
[Chat: How many will you eat?] As much as I want
I think 10 is a good number
I always forget about this packet
The oil packet
Not Jjapaghetti's oil packet, but every other instant noodle
Bon appetit
Looks good
I always sound like I lost my voice

Kimchi
On top
It's been a while and it tastes so good
So good
This will taste bad with eggs
Well, I never tried it I don't think it'll be good
I apologize I meant to say "It probably won't be good"
Tasty
I see a lot of requests for Cream Jin Jjampong
I never had it either Did I?
Well, I don't remember So let's just say I never tried it
This one on top is a beef jjampong I never tried that either
Cream Jjampong and vienna sausage.. What are you doing!?
Jingu, don't go there
His spot over here is gone
So he came over here

Jingu
It's hot
Meow?
It's gone now
I'll make you a spot
Over here?
He really went there
It's so tiny here
He's mad he doesn't have his spot
I'll move some
Jingu is angry
[Chat: Move more stuff out] There's enough room there
Oh no!
This is so small
I didn't spill any
Not a single strip

This is so little, really
The powder is very
beige..?
It's like the shake shack fries cheese powder
[Chat: How many is that?] I'm cooking 2 at a time
It looks small
Way too small for me
Is this really 2 packs?
This is the Cream Jin Jjampong
It looks creamy Can you guys see it?
What flavor is this?
It just tastes like how it looks
It's not bad
It tastes very instant-food-like
It's really unique It's a new flavor
This tastes better without kimchi

What next?
You're scaring me
What next?
Udon?
It says to put the flakes in last
The garnish doesn't look bad at all
Bon appetit
I'll move so you can see the cat
This udon
Tastes completely different from the cup noodle one
It's a lot more savory
It's good
Delicious
Pretty sure there are a lot of people that can eat 6 packs of noodles
People eat at least 2, right?
[Chat: She's in a different world]

No, I mean If it's just noodles
2, right?
Say 'ah'
I want to make a YouTube channel for Jingu
I want to show him off
He loves the camera
He always comes to be on the screen when I stream
I want to make Jingu videos, but I'm busy making my mukbang videos
So I can't
Jingu is so cute He's so adorable in person
He's a better streamer than I am
[Chat: Just switch off]
Fewer mukbang videos and more Jingu videos?
Yummy
Which one?
Fire Chicken? I see a lot of fire chicken votes

I'm not lying I used to be so good at eating spicy foods
I went to a very spicy noodle place And ordered the spiciest level and ate it
[No witnesses though]
[Chat: Don't you want to beat your own record of 20 packs of ramyun noodles?]
I enjoy eating just the right amount these days
And just mukbang while interacting with chat I guess I've become old
I'm not weak!
Fire Chicken Carbonara
That's hot
Do you remember the first time you tried the fire chicken noodles?
They only used to have like the spicy chewy noodles and jjapaghetti
This was one of the first ones that came out with a unique flavor
It's so good
It's spicy
I've collected these over the years
It's spicy

Jinjja Jjolmyun is spicy too Don't kill me twice
Next one
Let's neutralize it with black bean noodles
I'll go wash this
It's so spicy
If I eat 2 more, is that 10 total?
I'm not getting full
Did you go in between the packs?
Don't spill it, don't spill it
Oh no!
I spilled a little
That scared me
I consume and digest at the same time
I'm sure I'll get full by eating 10 packs quickly
But if I eat it over a span of 1~2 hours
It doesn't fill me up

I think I left too much water in here
I was supposed to drain all the water out
All the water needs to be drained out for Paldo Jjajangmyun (brand)
Because their sauce is very watery already
Last bits of fire chicken
This tastes just like the real black bean noodles
It's good You guys didn't try it yet?
It doesn't taste very instant-like It's closer to the real deal
I will not allow any leftovers
I'll eat the black pepper ramyun as a snack now
It looks interesting, right?
This smells like garlic Or is it black pepper?
It's very strong
Never smelled something so bold
Except for the fire demon
I'll pour some hot water in here

Yes, the powder
Thank you
Wait, let's try the soup
It's good
It's like beef broth, but thicker And it has black pepper flavors
It tastes great
A combination of black pepper and beef broth
I finished it
Tiny bit left
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
